zh.lifeSummary: 當James Wright於1639年4月10日在英國米德萊可希林格頓受洗時，他的父親Samuel Wright45歲，母親Margaret40歲。他於1664年1月18日與Abigail Jesse在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1676年登記服兵役。他去世於1689年5月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年50歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓布里奇 史崔特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Wright于1639年4月10日在英国米德萊可希林格頓受洗时，他的父亲Samuel Wright45岁，母亲Margaret40岁。他于1664年1月18日与Abigail Jesse在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1676年登记服兵役。他去世于1689年5月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年50岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓布里奇 史崔特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a craftsman or maker of machinery, mostly in wood, of any of a wide range of kinds, from Middle English and Older Scots wriht, wright, wricht, writh, write (Old English wyrhta, wryhta) ‘craftsman’, especially ‘carpenter, joiner’. The term is found in various combinations (for example, Cartwright and Wainwright ), but when used in isolation it often referred to a builder of windmills or watermills. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Wrights
meanings: English: variant of Wright , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wrightsman
meanings: Probably English (although no longer found in Britain), meaning‘servant of the wright’ (see   Wright  ).

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Wrightson
meanings: English (northern England, especially Durham): patronymic from   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: McWright
meanings: Scottish or Irish: Gaelic patronymic with the English and Scots occupational term   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’. The name is possibly a part translation of   McIntyre  , which fully translates as ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: Wrightman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wright ‘craftsman’ (see Wright ) + man ‘man’, denoting someone who assisted a craftsman.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in the memorial list

Bridge Street Cemetery is located at 156 Bridge Street (Route 9) in Northampton next Lampron Park and the Bridge Street Elementary School.  Established in 1661, it is the oldest cemetery in Northampton.  The City of Northampton oversees the cemetery.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When James Wright was christened on 10 April 1639, in Hillingdon, Middlesex, England, his father, Samuel Wright, was 45 and his mother, Margaret, was 40. He married Abigail Jesse on 18 January 1664, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1676. He died on 10 May 1689, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Wright a été baptisé le 10 avril 1639, à Hillingdon, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Samuel Wright, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Abigail Jesse le 18 janvier 1664, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1676. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1689, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Wright am 10. April 1639 in Hillingdon, Middlesex, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Wright 45 und seine Mutter Margaret 40. Er hat am 18. Januar 1664 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Abigail Jesse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1676 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 10. Mai 1689 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Wright è stato battezzato il 10 aprile 1639 nel Hillingdon, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Samuel Wright, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Abigail Jesse il 18 gennaio 1664, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1676. Morì il 10 maggio 1689, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: James Wrightが1639年4月10日にイギリスミッドレセックスヒリングドンで洗礼を受けた時，父Samuel Wrightは45歳，母Margaretは40歳であった。1664年1月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンでAbigail Jesseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年に兵役登録をした。彼は1689年5月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで50歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンブリッジ ストレエト セメテリーにて埋葬された。

브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴

ko.lifeSummary: James Wright(이)가 1639년 4월 10일 영국 미들레세스 힐링던에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Wright(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1664년 1월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 Abigail Jesse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1689년 5월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴 브리지 스트릿 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Wright foi batizado em 10 de abril de 1639, em Hillingdon, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Wright, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Abigail Jesse em 18 de janeiro de 1664, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1676. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1689, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Wright был крещен 10 апреля 1639 г. в местности хиллингдон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Samuel Wright было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Abigail Jesse 18 января 1664 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1676 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 10 мая 1689 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности бридж стрит кеметири, нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Wright se bautizó el 10 de abril de 1639, en Hillingdon, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Samuel Wright, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Abigail Jesse el 18 de enero de 1664, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1676. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1689, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.

th.Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts Bay: สปริงฟิลด์, มาสซาชูเซตตสเบย์คโลอนี, บริทิชคโลเนิยลอาเมอริก้า
